tasks.name: Signing Requests
tasks.description: Business submits a contract needing signatures. Legal Ops uploads it to SpotDraft and routes it to internal and counterparty signers.
tasks.note: SpotDraft; Jira→SpotDraft→Dokobit automation in progress. 47h→4h SLA target.

tasks.name: Administrative Support
tasks.description: Document access requests, status updates, and admin work that doesn't require legal judgment.

tasks.name: SpotDraft Admin
tasks.description: Managing access, templates, and workflows in SpotDraft — Bolt's contract management and e-signature platform.

tasks.name: Signing subtasks after Review ticket
tasks.description: Sub-tasks tagged with signing label — systematically created when a parent contract review reaches the signing step. These follow a "To be signed: [original review title]" pattern, confirming they're direct children of contract review    tickets.
tasks.note: New Legal Ops specialist starting May to lead this redesign.

tasks.name: External Counsel Invoices
tasks.description: Reviewing and approving law firm invoices via BrightFlag. AI checks invoices against billing guidelines before approval and payment.

tasks.name: Dokobit, Wet ink, DocuSign
tasks.description: Sign requests with alternative signature methods

tasks.name: Litigation Response
tasks.description: Managing lawsuits and claims with external counsel. Every case is unique; requires strategic judgment. Cannot be meaningfully automated.

tasks.name: Regulatory Inquiries
tasks.description: Responding to competition authorities, transport regulators, and licensing bodies across 50+ jurisdictions. Deep local law knowledge required.
tasks.note: Magdalena: roughly 20% of team time. Not well-tracked in Jira.

tasks.name: FAQ / Legal Questions
tasks.description: Recurring business questions now answered by the Flank AI Slack bot per country. E.g. 'Where's the NDA template?', 'What's the VAT number?'
tasks.note: Flank AI chatbot is LIVE. Alex: 'clear drop in low-value ticket volume.' Time share is post-Flank (was ~15% before).

tasks.name: Administrative Support
tasks.description: Document access, status updates, template requests, and similar admin work. Often arrives via Slack DM instead of proper ticket.

tasks.name: Driver / Consumer Complaints
tasks.description: Legal risk triage on standard complaints from drivers or consumers. Minimal variation between cases; repetitive pattern recognition.
tasks.note: Magdalena flagged as low-value BAU with automation potential.

tasks.name: DPA Reviews
tasks.description: Reviewing data processing agreements with vendors before data is shared. Bolt has 17,000+ suppliers; a standard playbook exists for common clauses.

tasks.name: Authority Requests
tasks.description: Responding to bailiff letters and regulator requests within a 24-hour SLA. Covers 50+ jurisdictions; translation is a key bottleneck.

tasks.name: GDPR / Privacy Queries
tasks.description: Internal questions about data privacy compliance. The Lex chatbot (IT-built) partially handles these for the compliance team.

tasks.name: DSARs
tasks.description: Data Subject Access Requests — individuals formally requesting access to their personal data held by Bolt.

tasks.name: Data Incidents
tasks.description: Investigating and responding to data breaches or privacy violations. Each incident is unique and requires case-by-case risk assessment.

tasks.name: T&C Management
tasks.description: Maintaining 800+ sets of terms & conditions across markets and product features. No central repository — T&Cs live across emails and personal drives.
tasks.note: Web team accidentally deleted all T&Cs; 10% permanently lost. Greenfield problem.

tasks.name: Regulated Contract Review
tasks.description: Reviewing contracts from banks, PSPs, and other regulated entities. Heavily constrained by law; most clauses cannot be changed by either party.
tasks.note: Stefano Roggiero: only Spellbook power user (~1,000h logged). Others use Claude/ChatGPT ad hoc.

tasks.name: Product Feature Reviews
tasks.description: Legal sign-off on new product features before launch in each jurisdiction. Involves checking local regulatory requirements.

tasks.name: Policy Updates
tasks.description: Drafting and updating internal policies and external-facing legal documents as laws or business practices change.

tasks.name: Complex Negotiations
tasks.description: Multi-party contract negotiations involving significant commercial and legal risk. 'Dubai horror story': all-night Word↔Google Docs version merging.

tasks.name: Vendor Partnerships
tasks.description: Strategic vendor and partner agreements negotiated at the HQ/group level, typically high-value commercial deals.

tasks.name: M&A / Strategic Deals
tasks.description: Mergers, acquisitions, joint ventures, and major strategic transactions. Requires the highest level of legal judgment.

tasks.name: Entity Management
tasks.description: Managing Bolt's corporate entities across 50+ markets: incorporations, registrations, director changes, and statutory filings.
tasks.note: Legis tool purchased 4 years ago is underutilized.

tasks.name: Board Resolutions
tasks.description: Preparing and executing formal corporate resolutions and board approvals across Bolt's entity structure.
